prestazioni: Engine: C32A1 (3.2L DOHC V6, 200 PS stock) - Forced induction via HKS GT-SS Supercharger Kit (8 psi base boost) with custom billet crank pulley and upgraded HKS intercooler core (600x300x76mm) to support 350+ WHP on 98 RON fuel. Requires ported intake manifold (Supertech Racing) and upgraded fuel system with Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump + AEM 320cc/min injectors.

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2.2-way) with upgraded half-shafts (Driveshaft Shop 3.5" chromoly) and ACT 6-puck sprung clutch (HD pressure plate) to handle increased torque. Transmission: Stock 4-speed auto swapped to JDM-spec 5-speed manual (KA9 Type II) with PPG close-ratio gears (1st: 3.307, 2nd: 2.105, 3rd: 1.428) and upgraded synchros (Quaife).

Suspension/Handling: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for KA9 chassis) with spherical bearing front upper control arms (SPL Parts) and rear subframe reinforcement plates (Hasport). Brakes: Endless MX72 6-piston front calipers (355mm rotors) + 4-piston rear (330mm) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and stainless steel braided lines. Wheels: Work Emotion CR Kiwami (18x9.5 +35 front, 18x10.5 +40 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/40/18 front, 285/35/18 rear).
estetica: Body: Veilside Fortune 99 widebody conversion (KA9-specific fitment) with custom carbon fiber front splitter (Seibon) and rear diffuser (Varis). Hood: Seibon carbon fiber Type-R replica (vented) with custom heat extractors. Mirrors: JDM Honda Legend KB1/KA1 carbon fiber mirrors (OEM+).

Interior: Bride Zeta III bucket seats (Sabelt 6-point harnesses) with custom rear seat delete (aluminum panel by AutoPower Japan). Steering: NRG Innovations quick-release hub with Momo Prototipo 350mm suede wheel. Gauges: Defi Advance BF series (oil temp, oil pressure, boost, wideband) in custom A-pillar pod (Carbon Creations).

Lighting: JDM Honda Legend KA9 HID projector retrofit (D2S 4300K) with custom LED halo rings (Morimoto XB35). Rear: Depo Racing LED taillights (smoked) with sequential turn signals. Underglow: Oracle Lighting S-Series RGBW (chassis-mounted, switchable via remote).
